title: Listening - Part 3
description: For each question, write the correct answer in the gap. Write one or two words or a number or a date or a time.
instructions: You will hear one person giving information. For questions 14–19, write the correct answer in the gap.
context: You will hear a teacher giving information about a school trip to a science museum.
audio_script: Woman: Listen carefully, everyone, because I’m going to tell you about our trip to the science museum on Thursday. We’re going by coach, and we’ll leave from outside the school [14]library[/14], not from the main gate as we usually do. Please be there by eight twenty, because the coach must leave at half past eight. You should bring a packed lunch, but don’t bring glass bottles. The museum has asked us to use plastic bottles only. When we arrive, our first activity will be a workshop about [15]space[/15]. You’ll learn how astronauts prepare for journeys, and you’ll try a simple experiment in groups. After that, we’ll have time to look around the museum. The newest display is about [16]robots[/16], and I know many of you will enjoy that. Please remember that you must stay with your group leader at all times. Lunch will be in the museum [17]garden[/17] if the weather is good. If it rains, we’ll use the education room instead. In the afternoon, there’s a film in the museum cinema. It lasts forty minutes and begins at [18]2:15[/18]. We expect to get back to school by four thirty, but traffic can be busy, so tell your parents not to worry if we’re a little late. The cost of the trip is ten pounds, but students who have a museum card only need to pay [19]four[/19] pounds for the coach. Please bring your money and permission letter tomorrow morning. Teachers will carry emergency phone numbers, but you should still keep your own group card in your pocket during the visit.

items.text_before: Coach leaves from outside the school

questions.prompt: Coach leaves from outside the school
questions.explanation: The coach will leave from outside the school library.
The first workshop will be about space.
The newest display is about robots.
Lunch will be in the museum garden if the weather is good.
Students with a museum card pay four pounds for the coach.
